title: Let's get mending!
description: Plays gamblecore sound effects when you roll librarian trades
body:
# Let's Get Mending!

A mod that plays **gamblecore audio** whenever you roll a librarian trade. If you need some *really* dumb noise droning in your ears as you try to get mending, this is it.  

This mod works in vanilla as well as most mods that allow for easy trade cycling

## How it Works
- Whenever you refresh librarian trades, the mod plays a short gamblecore remix audio clip.  
- Mending = Jackpot 

## Credits
- [Gamblecore by raxdflipnote](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IPFiKEm-oNI)
- [Remix by Purple Drip Boy](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8aJZ_msjauo)
